designs.title: Pipeline Overview
designs.description: Horizontal 11-stage strip. Each stage = card with artifact count + top winners + gap badge.

designs.title: Mining View
designs.description: Card grid of top ~30 standout artifacts. Quality, adoption-fit, mineable phrases visible per card.

designs.title: Triage Console
designs.description: Interactive filter / drill / analyze interface over all 1,100 artifacts. Chip filters across stage, cluster, repo, type, quality, adoption. Sortable table + click-to-open detail drawer.

designs.title: Blackboard Pattern Overview
designs.description: Architecture diagram of the blackboard workflow pattern: conductor / subagent / store, three worker contracts, Oscar-fix isolation rules, EAV envelope.

designs.title: Probe Progression
designs.description: The four blackboard probes as a visual timeline. Each added one dimension — parallel fan-out, scripted refinement, human gate, async API + binary artifacts. 78/78 ACs.

designs.title: Same Disease, Three Medicines
designs.description: Three-way comparison: YLO blackboard vs POEM OS vs prompt.supportsignal across three lenses (prompt engineering / workflow shape / architecture-runner-isolation). Thesis: same orchestrator-poisoning failure, three cures — isolate / discipline / remove.

designs.title: The Four Workflows
designs.description: Each of the four YLO probes rendered as a flow diagram: parallel fan-out (×12), sequential refinement loop, human-gated branch, multi-phase pipeline (×6 explore → select → ×3 finals). Node-typed, store-keys labelled, transcribed verbatim from the workflow JSON specs.

designs.title: POEM Consolidation
designs.description: Decision board for folding YLO's learnings into POEM: the 9-item cross-system punchlist (POEM/AWB G3/YLO/brain), the event-sourcing state model (mutability modes → projection folds + 3-layer architecture), and the agent roster with the Penny-vs-new-Agent-Engineer naming decision.
